tactical_shape: Pushed relentlessly down the sides, with attacks coming from both wings
Dropped back to defend a precious lead after scoring
standout_players: Gonzalo Plata — scored the winner with the outside of his boot
Moisés Caicedo — imposing presence, led the intensity in midfield
Nilson Angulo — found the equaliser from the edge of the box
John Yeboah — repeatedly weaved through the Germany midfield
Kevin Rodríguez — involved in the move for the winner and later linked up with Plata
home_read.momentum: A stirring win over full-strength Germany sends Ecuador through to the last 32 and could restore faith in Beccacece after a shaky start to the tournament.

tactical_shape: Full-strength side despite having already secured top spot
Regained control after the hydration break but were largely frustrated
Main creative outlet came from David Raum deliveries from the left
standout_players: Florian Wirtz — created the opening goal
Hernán Galíndez — only forced into a header save by Havertz, otherwise little troubled
fatigue_injuries: Only injury-induced changes were made to the starting XI
away_read.momentum: An uninspired, error-prone display leaves Germany beaten and frustrated, with their main warning sign being how little threat they offered for long spells.
